Trip.title: Trip
Trip.description: A group trip requiring expense sharing.

memberCommitments.description: Mapping of member name to committed amount.

locationUrl.description: URL link to the departure location (e.g. Google Maps).

ownerId.description: UID of the user who created the trip.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: A task or item reminder for a specific person.

Expense.title: Expense
Expense.description: An individual expense logged for a trip.

paidBy.description: Name of the member who paid.

/trips/{tripId}/expenses/{expenseId}.description: Subcollection for expenses within a specific trip.

/trips/{tripId}/tasks/{taskId}.description: Subcollection for tasks/items within a specific trip.

/trips/{tripId}/contributions/{contribut.description: Subcollection for member payments into the trip pot.

/trips/{tripId}/gear/{gearId}.description: Subcollection for trip equipment and tools.
